/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared  -o libanalyzer.so CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/analyzer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/analyzercolorwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/analyzersettingsdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/visualanalyzerfactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/analyzer_autogen/YTRUC5LEIS/qrc_translations.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lixiang/Downloads/qmmp-2.3.1/build-linux/src/qmmp:/home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib: ../../../qmmp/libqmmp.so.2.3.1 /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.5.3 /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.5.3 /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.5.3 -pthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
